examples: Ancient South American civilisations prized them so much for their medicinal and aphrodisiacal properties, they even used them as currency.
People who do not know when to leave an organisation frequently crash and burn. People who jump before they are pushed have a good chance of leaping to yet another aphrodisiacal throne.
The earthy, musky perfume of this subterranean delicacy has long been rumored to possess aphrodisiacal powers.
In medieval times men were said to push herbs, mushrooms and other purportedly aphrodisiacal potions on women.
